{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043910D37CD4FA0CF79C011D3A"}"},"total":376},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7212628492117263161","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"难得一遇的悬疑好文，第一个副本就是惊喜满满的，从开头营造的剧情，一直让人追读下来，其中几个场景，着实看的人头皮一麻，可以的作者，后面继续保持这种高质量水准哈！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679321025,"group_id":"7206317909205847055","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxucu4iqhml0UkBeuIyKLeRvaKOYxLR2hDbBywXseL5+","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/91bd8315b9914ae1a26d3832db8da0a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793405&x-signature=6fFLxTxaCQSElBj95HSNLkHoAyI%3D","user_id":"4336092556561549","user_name":"下雪不打架"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336092556561549","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663147002,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7206317909205847055","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+惊悚游戏+黑暗文+无女主+杀伐果断】
本书原名《无限诡异游戏》，又名《只要我足够变态就是鬼怕我》《我将主宰诡异》。
诡异游戏降临世界三十六年，筛选玩家进入充满诡异和怪谈的副本艰难求生。
标本制作师司契主动进入游戏，此后一切变数因他而生。
“所谓杀人偿命，不过是针对弱者的规则；而规则，也不过是可以利用的玩具罢了。”
“队友这种东西，只有在有利用价值的时候才有活着的必要。”
“我是个坏人，毕竟，好人不长命啊……”
【能接受这样三观的进，不接受的看了别喷/笑】
——文青版（不说人话版）文案——
规则以神明为食，神明以众生为祭。
诡异游戏为罗网，恐怖复苏为媒介。
冷峻的遮羞布下是鲜血淋漓的恐怖。
不愿做飨宴上的牲醴，司契纵身跃出桎梏。
撕碎道德，在黑白边界独舞；挣脱规则，搭建自己的王座。
他此世不是神明，诡异游戏却早已为他备好神座，并用死亡的盛典迎他归来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o278ef183663e4386f23504a3a129ce6d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"笑讽嘲","author_id":"","book_id":"7206317909205847055","book_name":"无限流：疯批优雅变态大佬杀疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1401人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7206318009885917748","read_count":"1401","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"245679"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"111","tags":"悬疑脑洞,无限流,灵异,反派,无女主,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2fd424237eace188805e04616198ca0f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395950&x-signature=8JlZHmD%2F0jckAADmHk4otOQlGQ8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"764864895125229","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.330491e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043910D37CD4FA0CF79C011D3A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},
